description: Restore database connectivity for the 'inventory-frontend' application in the 'legacy-apps' namespace. The application is failing to connect to 'database-svc:5432' because the database was migrated to 'postgres-primary.core-data.svc.cluster.local:5432' in the 'core-data' namespace. Create an 'ExternalName' Service named 'database-svc' in the 'legacy-apps' namespace pointing to the new FQDN. Update the 'db-protection' NetworkPolicy in the 'core-data' namespace to allow Ingress on TCP port 5432 from pods in the 'legacy-apps' namespace using a 'namespaceSelector', while ensuring 'rogue-ns' remains blocked. Do not modify the 'inventory-frontend' Deployment. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!

metadata.occupation: Cloud Systems Engineer / Site Reliability Engineer
